query:
SELECT domain, COUNT(*) as seeded FROM knowledge_scenarios GROUP BY domain ORDER BY domain;
SELECT COUNT(*) as grand_total FROM knowledge_scenarios;

SELECT COUNT(*) as grand_total FROM knowledge_scenarios;
